sourcePrompt: An M18 Claymore mine deployed on its legs, a small curved rectangular block about twenty-two centimeters wide. The olive-drab plastic body bows convex toward the front with raised embossed lettering, two pairs of thin scissor legs splay into the soil beneath, and a blasting-cap well with a wire stub sits on top. Olive-drab plastic, small. Low-poly, blocky, modular; simple readable silhouette.
